title: Impaired PIEZO1 function in patients with a novel autosomal recessive congenital lymphatic dysplasia

primary_findings.novel_discovery: PIEZO1 loss-of-function associated with congenital lymphatic dysplasia
primary_findings.genetic_basis: Biallelic mutations identified in patient siblings
primary_findings.phenotype: Persistent lymphoedema from compromised lymphatic development
primary_findings.significance: Delineates novel clinical category of PIEZO1-associated hereditary lymphoedema

mutations_identified.mutation1: Splicing variant leading to early truncation
mutations_identified.effect: Greatly attenuated PIEZO1 function in affected alleles

mechanotransduction_role.new_understanding: PIEZO1 essential for lymphatic system development and function
mechanotransduction_role.prior_knowledge: Known for vascular, renal, and erythrocyte mechanotransduction
